question:
[PICTURE REQUIRED]
The table above shows the number of each type of bicycle sold at a local shop last year. If 300 bikes will be sold next month, what is the best estimate (based on last year's sales) of the number of mountain bicycles that will be sold?
diagram:
| Bicycle Type | Number |
|--------------|--------|
| Road         | 600    |
| Mountain     | 900    |
| Hybrid       | 1,200  |
| Total        | 2,700  |

solution.strategy: Find fraction of mountain bikes from table; apply to 300.
